fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Filling creates water on a delayed simulator tick while the pot remains on the sink.

state_list.name: WAIT_FOR_WATER_IN_POT
state_list.phase_goal: Wait for the filled pot to actually contain water.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Robotouille creates the water object after the fill delayed effects settle.

state_list.name: WAIT_FOR_WATER_IN_POT_FINAL
state_list.phase_goal: Wait one more tick for water creation to finish.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: The fill action's nested delayed effect takes three simulator ticks in Robotouille.

state_list.name: WAIT_FOR_WATER_IN_POT_SETTLED
state_list.phase_goal: Wait until the water object exists in the pot.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Hands must be free and the pot must be at the sink.

state_list.name: PICK_UP_POT_WITH_WATER
state_list.phase_goal: Pick up the water-filled pot.

completion_condition: robot is at empty stove with pot

fsm_allowed_actions.target: empty stove while holding water-filled pot

state_list.name: NAVIGATE_TO_STOVE_WITH_POT
state_list.phase_goal: Bring the pot to an empty stove.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: The stove must be empty so the pot is directly on the stove.

state_list.name: PLACE_POT_ON_STOVE
state_list.phase_goal: Place the pot on the stove.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Water must already be in the pot and the pot must be on the stove.

state_list.name: START_BOIL_WATER
state_list.phase_goal: Start boiling the water in the pot.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Wait if boiling is the only remaining useful process.
Only switch to ingredient preparation or serving steps that do not interrupt boiling.

state_list.name: WATER_BOILING_BRANCH

state_list.phase_goal: Preserve boiling water while advancing independent ingredient subgoals.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Robotouille creates the water object after the fill delayed effects settle.

state_list.phase_goal: Wait one more tick for water creation to finish.

state_list.phase_goal: Bring the pot to the sink.

state_list.phase_goal: Place the pot on the sink.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: The pot must be empty and placed on the sink.

state_list.name: FILL_POT_WITH_WATER
state_list.phase_goal: Fill the pot with water.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Filling creates water on a delayed simulator tick while the pot remains on the sink.

state_list.name: WAIT_FOR_WATER_IN_POT
state_list.phase_goal: Wait for the filled pot to actually contain water.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Robotouille creates the water object after the fill delayed effects settle.

state_list.name: WAIT_FOR_WATER_IN_POT_FINAL
state_list.phase_goal: Wait one more tick for water creation to finish.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: The fill action's nested delayed effect takes three simulator ticks in Robotouille.

state_list.name: WAIT_FOR_WATER_IN_POT_SETTLED
state_list.phase_goal: Wait until the water object exists in the pot.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Hands must be free and the pot must be at the sink.

state_list.phase_goal: Pick up the water-filled pot.

state_list.phase_goal: Bring the pot to an empty stove.

state_list.phase_goal: Place the pot on the stove.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Water must already be in the pot and the pot must be on the stove.

state_list.name: START_BOIL_WATER
state_list.phase_goal: Start boiling the water in the pot.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Wait if boiling is the only remaining useful process.
Only switch to ingredient preparation or serving steps that do not interrupt boiling.

notes: Runtime verifier should prevent removing the pot if that would break the soup pipeline.
state_list.phase_goal: Preserve boiling water while advancing independent ingredient subgoals.
